query: 帮我开始做用户认证功能
rationale: '开始做' is explicitly listed in description trigger keywords

query: /pace-dev 实现搜索功能
rationale: Direct slash command invocation

query: 帮我修复登录页面的 bug，点击登录按钮没反应
rationale: '修复' is explicitly listed in description trigger keywords

query: 继续推进 CR-003 的开发
rationale: '继续推进' is explicitly listed in description trigger keywords, plus CR number

query: implement the payment processing module
rationale: 'implement' is explicitly listed in description trigger keywords (English)

query: 帮我写代码，实现用户头像上传功能
rationale: '写代码' and '实现' are both listed in description trigger keywords

query: /pace-dev #5
rationale: Direct slash command with CR number argument

query: 帮我编码一下数据导出功能
rationale: '编码' is explicitly listed in description trigger keywords

query: /pace-dev --last
rationale: Direct slash command with --last flag to resume last CR

query: start coding the notification system, I want push notifications via WebSocket
rationale: 'coding' is explicitly listed in description trigger keywords (English)

query: 不做搜索功能了，先砍掉
rationale: Requirement cancellation -> /pace-change. Description explicitly excludes requirement changes.

query: 加一个新需求：支持暗黑模式
rationale: Adding new requirement -> /pace-change, NOT pace-dev. '加需求' is a pace-change keyword.

query: 这个 CR 做完了，帮我提交审核
rationale: Code review submission -> /pace-review. Description explicitly excludes code review.

query: 帮我看看当前项目进度到哪了
rationale: Progress overview -> /pace-status, not development action

query: 帮我跑一下测试看看覆盖率怎么样
rationale: Test execution -> /pace-test, not development

query: 这个功能的优先级调高一点，先做这个
rationale: Priority change -> /pace-change (reprioritize), not development

query: 分析一下这个架构决策的风险
rationale: Risk analysis -> /pace-guard, not development

query: 准备发布 v2.0.0
rationale: Release management -> /pace-release, not development

query: 下一步该做什么？帮我推荐一个任务
rationale: Next action recommendation -> /pace-next, not development

query: 帮我初始化 devpace，这是个新项目
rationale: Project initialization -> /pace-init, not development

query: 帮我开发一下购物车模块
rationale: Tests '开发' keyword listed in description but not directly tested in existing evals

query: 帮我改一下这个按钮的颜色，太暗了看不清
rationale: BOUNDARY: '帮我改' targeting UI/code is pace-dev, not pace-change. Critical disambiguation

query: 重构一下用户模块的数据库查询逻辑，太慢了
rationale: Tests 'refactor' - common dev action not in current trigger keywords but clearly development

query: 继续做昨天没做完的搜索功能
rationale: Tests implicit resume without --last flag, natural continuation request

query: fix the authentication bug where tokens expire too early
rationale: Tests English 'fix' keyword - common but not in current description trigger list

query: 做个用户反馈的弹窗组件，点击后展开表单
rationale: Tests colloquial '做个' + ensures '反馈' in UI context does NOT route to pace-feedback

query: 修一下单元测试，有两个 case 的断言写错了
rationale: BOUNDARY: Fixing test CODE is pace-dev (writing code), not pace-test (running tests)

query: 登录接口有 bug，密码含 & 符号时返回 500，修一下
rationale: BOUNDARY: Developer-initiated bug fix is pace-dev, not pace-feedback

query: 帮我改一下这个功能的验收标准，需要加上手机号验证
rationale: BOUNDARY: '帮我改' + '验收标准' = requirement modification -> pace-change

query: 帮我看看这段代码实现有没有问题，逻辑感觉不太对
rationale: BOUNDARY: '看看'+'问题' = code review intent -> pace-review, not active development

query: 验证一下注册功能的邮箱验证是否正常工作
rationale: '验证' is a pace-test keyword, intent is testing not developing

query: 线上有用户反馈说支付失败了，帮我处理一下
rationale: BOUNDARY: User-reported production issue -> pace-feedback. '用户反馈'+'线上' signals external feedback

query: 安排一下下个迭代要开发哪些功能
rationale: Contains '开发' but intent is iteration planning -> pace-plan. Keyword-in-planning-context trap

query: 为什么选了这个技术方案来实现？追溯一下决策
rationale: Contains '实现' but intent is decision tracing -> pace-trace. Keyword-in-inquiry-context trap

query: 总结一下这轮迭代的开发效率和质量怎么样
rationale: Contains '开发' but intent is retrospective -> pace-retro. Keyword-in-summary-context trap
